subcodes.first_line: O thou who art favored and accepted at the Court of the One! The human temple is adorned with the most beauteous raiment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل و مقبول درگاه احدیت هیکل انسانیرا برازنده ترین قبا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
